subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate the interest in exploring a potential collaboration.

We'd be happy to schedule an introductory call this week. Could you share your availability for a 30-minute video call over the next few days? I'm sure we can find a time that works.

Regarding the internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share those externally, as internal contact details aren't disclosed outside the company for security and privacy reasons. That said, if a call with senior stakeholders would be helpful, I'd be glad to arrange for the right people to join our introductory conversation. Just let me know what's most useful on your end, and I'll make it happen.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best,
Your AI Assistant
on behalf of the team
